간단프로필
대표 보유기술
SOC Architecture
HW Architecture Apr 2025 ~ Present | Cache Coherent Interconnect Architecture and
Power-On-Self-Test Design (SOC IP Dev.)
- Designed debug architecture and features to enhance system
observability and silicon debug efficiency
- Led post-silicon debugging and issue resolution for Cache
Coherent Interconnect
Jul 2023 ~ Mar 2025 | SoC Architect (Automotive Systems)
- Designed DFD (Design-for-Debug) and IST (In-System Test)
architectures for IVI and Neural Network systems
- Developed IPC and Safety Island architectures
- Researched next-generation chiplet-based automotive SoC
architectures
- Defined system architecture and specifications for HPC automotive
SoCs
- Authored and reviewed ISO 26262 Safety HAS documentation
Oct 2016 ~ Jun 2023 | Automotive SoC Architect (Foundry Design
Service)
- Led SoC architecture and full-chip RTL design for AD/ADAS-
targeted automotive SoCs
- Developed IST, POST, and DFD architectures
- Managed silicon validation, yield analysis, and post-silicon
debugging
- Collaborated with global clients on specifications and design
requirements
Feb 2012 ~ Sep 2016 | SoC DFD Architect, Subsystem Designer
(Mobile AP Dev.)
- Developed embedded scan dump (Scan2DRAM) architecture
- Designed DFD architecture and IPs
- Designed camera and ISP subsystems for mobile APs
- Developed memory interface and system bus architectures for
wearable APs

경력
삼성전자
14년 2개월
Principal Engineer
2025년 4월 - Present (1년)
Cache Coherent Interconnect Design and Debug Architect
- Designed debug architecture and features for Cache Coherent Interconnect
to improve system observability and debugging efficiency.
- Led post-silicon debugging efforts to identify and resolve silicon-level issues,
ensuring design reliability and performance.
Principal Engineer
2024년 3월 - 2025년 3월 (1년 1개월)
SoC Architect with Automotive Systems, AP Advanced Technology
- Led architecture design efforts for Design-for-Debug (DFD) and In-System
Test (IST) across IVI and Neural Network (NN) systems.
- Designed IPC and Safety Island (SFI) architectures to enhance system safety
and communication.
- Contributed as an author and served as the final reviewer of Safety HAS
documents for Samsung’s inaugural ISO 26262 certification program.
Staff Engineer
2023년 7월 - 2024년 2월 (8개월)
SoC Architect with Automotive Systems, AP Advanced Technology
- Developed architecture for Design-for-Debug (DFD) and In-System Test (IST)
focused on both IVI and Neural Network (NN) systems.
- Designed IPC and Safety Island (SFI) architectures.
- Conducted research and architectural design for next-generation chiplet
automotive platforms.
- Converted high-level product requirements into architecture and design
specifications for HPC (High Performance Computing) Automotive SoC as an
active team member.
Staff Engineer
2018년 3월 - 2023년 6월 (5년 4개월)
ASIC SoC Architecture & Fullchip (RTL) Design, Foundry Design Service
- Designed SoC architecture and fullchip RTL implementation for Automotive
SoC targeting AD/ADAS applications.
Page 2 of 4
- Architected In-System-Test (IST) and POST as safety features for
Automotive SoC targeting AD/ADAS applications.
- Managed top-level SoC integration and collaborated cross-functionally with
global tier-1 clients on spec hand-off and design requirement discussions.
- Acted as design lead, collaborating cross-functionally with multiple teams to
drive project development and deliverables.
- Led Design-for-Debug (DFD) architecture design across multiple projects to
enhance debugging capability and efficiency.
- Led silicon validation, yield analysis, and silicon debugging activities to
ensure production quality and reliability.
Senior Engineer
2016년 10월 - 2018년 2월 (1년 5개월)
SOC Fullchip Design and DFD Architecture, Foundry Design Service
- Designed fullchip RTL for advanced automotive SoCs targeting AD/ADAS
applications.
- Architected Power-On-Self-Test (POST) as a safety feature to meet
automotive functional safety standards.
- Provided silicon debugging support for automotive SoCs, facilitating efficient
resolution of post-silicon validation issues.
- Developed debug architecture and IP solutions for ASIC customers.
Senior Engineer
2015년 8월 - 2016년 9월 (1년 2개월)
SOC DFD Architecture and IP Design
- Developed Design-for-Debug (DFD) architecture for multiple mobile AP
projects
- Led implementation of debug features and collaborated with multi-disciplinary
teams to integrate DFD solutions
- Pioneered the development and architecture of embedded scandump
technology(Scan2DRAM), leveraging scan chains to capture internal register
states for comprehensive and efficient silicon debugging.
Senior Engineer
2015년 3월 - 2015년 7월 (5개월)
SOC Design Engineer
- Designed memory interface and system bus architectures for wearable AP.
Engineer
2012년 2월 - 2015년 2월 (3년 1개월)
SOC Design Engineer
Page 3 of 4
- Performed sub-system design for camera and ISP blocks across multiple
mobile AP projects.
- Supported specification decisions and architectural analysis to ensure
optimal integration and performance within SoCs.
